heading: Use of funds for certain emergent threats or opportunities
label: 3712 Use of funds for certain emergent threats or opportunities
notes: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “Not later than 15 days before the date on which” for “At the time at which” in introductory provisions and added par. (3).Pub. L. 114–328
amendments: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “Not later than 15 days before the date on which” for “At the time at which” in introductory provisions and added par. (3).Pub. L. 114–328

children.label: A
children.text: assist the United States in the resolution of a critical emerging proliferation threat; or

children.label: B
children.text: permit the United States to take advantage of opportunities to achieve long-standing nonproliferation goals.
That such project or activity will be completed in a period not exceeding five years.
That the Department of Defense is the entity of the Federal Government that is most capable of carrying out such project or activity.
a description of the scope and duration of such project or activity; and

children.label: A
children.text: whether authorities other than the authority under this section are available to the Secretaries to perform such project or activity to meet the threats or goals identified under subsection (a)(1); and

children.label: B
children.text: if such other authorities exist, why the Secretaries were not able to use such authorities for such project or activity.

children.heading: Non-defense agency partner-nation contacts
children.label: c Non-defense agency partner-nation contacts
children.text: With respect to military-to-military and defense contacts carried out under subsection (a)(6) of , as further described in subsection (f) of such section, concurrence of the Secretary of State under subsection (a) is required only for participation in such contacts by personnel from non-defense agencies of foreign countries.section 3711 of this title

children.heading: Exception to requirement for certain determinations
children.label: d Exception to requirement for certain determinations
children.text: The requirement for a determination under subsection (a) shall not apply to a state of the former Soviet Union.
